title: polystichum auriculatum var. lentum
intro: Polystichum auriculatum var. lentum, also known as the Lentil-Leafed Polystichum fern, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum auriculatum var. lentum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in poultices to apply its medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
